title: NGE Postage Stamps
wikitext:
[]: NGE Postage Stamps             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 24, 2006 12:54 pm GAINAX's website recently posted this article, which apparently states that there are (or soon will be) Eva postage stamps. You can get a better look at the stamps here .

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 24, 2006 8:01 pm We need some of those over in the States! :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Dec 25, 2006 5:09 pm Naisu!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 25, 2006 5:16 pm I sent that link to my friend in Japan, and he flipped out. Apparently, he bought some and sent them to me for Christmas, was supposed to be a surprise.

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Mon Dec 25, 2006 7:33 pm Ornette wrote: I sent that link to my friend in Japan, and he flipped out. Apparently, he bought some and sent them to me for Christmas, was supposed to be a surprise.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Dec 25, 2006 10:11 pm DO WANT.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Wed Dec 27, 2006 10:27 am I'm pleasantly surprised that the three main Evas and Sachi actually got stamps. I would have thought they'd just do a gazillion different Asuka/Rei/Misatos.

[]: Re: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 27, 2006 12:47 pm chiefen wrote: Ornette wrote: I sent that link to my friend in Japan, and he flipped out. Apparently, he bought some and sent them to me for Christmas, was supposed to be a surprise.

[]: Re: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Dec 27, 2006 9:12 pm Ornette wrote: chiefen wrote: Ornette wrote: I sent that link to my friend in Japan, and he flipped out. Apparently, he bought some and sent them to me for Christmas, was supposed to be a surprise.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Dec 27, 2006 9:57 pm there is rally no ceiling is there?...no product line Eva can't infect?...no wall it can't pass?...no limit to the raw audacity of Gainax?...no cow it cannot milk?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 28, 2006 12:00 pm master0rolando wrote: there is rally no ceiling is there?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Dec 28, 2006 10:34 pm Do they have body pillowa? Those could be seen as pretty close...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Dec 28, 2006 10:54 pm Well, they have made these (each word links to a different product). You have to admit, adolescent bandage divestiture fetish is about as low as you can get without breaking the law. In fact, these may actually be against the law in some places where loli hentai is illegal, such as Canada.
